action.reasoning: Observation: The model improved to 0.0717 exprate. The feature map from DenseNet-121 (8x32) is likely too small for complex equations. Analysis: Using ResNet-50 with modified strides (replace_stride_with_dilation) will provide a larger feature map (16x64 = 1024 tokens). Adding a memory_key_padding_mask to the decoder will prevent it from attending to padded regions. Using a smaller learning rate for the pretrained backbone will stabilize training. Decision: Update model to ResNet-50 with dilation, add memory_key_padding_mask, adjust learning rates, and train for 25 epochs.
